reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.title: Six weeks in and the ROI is clear
reviews.text: I was sceptical about automation agencies. The honest report after six weeks is that my team stopped doing data entry entirely and our lead response time dropped from 4 hours to 8 minutes. The setup was genuinely painless.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.title: Finally a system I trust
reviews.text: I used to juggle eight separate tools. One deployment replaced all of it. The error monitoring is the reason I stayed nothing breaks silently.

reviews.name: Elena R.
reviews.title: Time savings hit first
reviews.text: I did not expect this. Within two weeks we saved 20 hours per week on admin. Knock-on effect on team morale, client satisfaction and revenue.

reviews.name: James K.
reviews.title: Worth every dollar
reviews.text: Not the cheapest, but I priced out hiring a junior ops person and it is genuinely better value. The fact that nothing breaks is the real ROI.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.title: Huge improvement on onboarding
reviews.text: Client onboarding used to take 14 days. Now it takes 3. Took one star off because we needed a couple of tweaks after launch but the team fixed them same day.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.title: Most transparent agency I have used
reviews.text: I reviewed the documentation three times before signing. The workflows are fully documented. No black-box magic. That alone made me a retainer client.

reviews.name: Anna B.
reviews.title: My business partner signed up too
reviews.text: Started for the lead automation. Stayed for everything else. My partner watched the results for a month and then asked me to set it up for his company too.

reviews.name: Thomas H.
reviews.title: Subtle, then undeniable
reviews.text: First week, nothing dramatic. Week three I realised I had not opened a spreadsheet in two weeks. That was the moment I knew this was working.

miniTestimonials.name: Sarah Chen
miniTestimonials.quote: Workflow by workflow, the most reliable automation partner we have worked with. Every system we handed off now runs itself.

miniTestimonials.name: Marcus Webb
miniTestimonials.quote: What I would have built internally if we had six months. PURIST shipped it in three weeks and monitors it 24/7.

miniTestimonials.name: Julia Ferreira
miniTestimonials.quote: Daily backbone of our entire fulfilment stack. 500+ orders processed automatically, zero manual entry. Non-negotiable.

miniTestimonials.name: Tom Bradley
miniTestimonials.quote: Battle-tested across 45 client accounts. Our entire ops team runs on PURIST workflows. It is embedded in how we deliver.

miniTestimonials.name: Natasha Okonkwo
miniTestimonials.quote: The first automation partner I have actively recommended to my own clients. Reliability standards higher than most in-house teams.

miniTestimonials.name: David Lascelles
miniTestimonials.quote: Measurable efficiency gains across every client I referred. The ROI is visible within the first 30 days, every time.

miniTestimonials.name: Priya Mehta
miniTestimonials.quote: The documentation shows how much care went into the architecture. The uptime confirms it every month. Built properly, not just fast.

miniTestimonials.name: Alex Drummond
miniTestimonials.quote: I stopped rotating agencies after the second PURIST workflow. It is the operational foundation every business unit now runs on.
